stemHtml:
Which of the following would trigger the publication of a NOTAM?

1. Opening, closure, or major operational changes at aerodromes/heliports or runways
2. Routine apron and taxiway maintenance that does not affect safe aircraft movement
3. Introduction, removal, or significant modification of visual aids
4. Failure or restoration of major aerodrome lighting components
5. Observations or forecasts of space weather phenomena
6. Disease outbreaks requiring changes to inoculation or quarantine measures
7. Unserviceability of location, destination, or instruction signs on the movement area
